name: Sloppy Joe Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven or large pan with a tight-fitting cover, brown the meat in fat. Season with salt and pepper, then remove from the pan. Pour off the fat drippings.
2. Add tomato sauce, water, and seasoning mix to the pan.
3. Return the meat to the pan. Cover and simmer for 3 to 3 1/2 hours, or until done. Alternatively, cook in a 325°F oven for the same amount of time.
4. Turn the meat once to ensure even cooking throughout. Add potatoes and carrots during the last 35 minutes of cooking, and zucchini during the last 15 minutes.
5. Remove the meat and keep warm. Skim off any excess fat. Taste the sauce and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper if necessary.
6. Serve sliced meat with vegetables and sauce.
